message:
fix(util): add isArray to util.types for compatibility

The native util module was missing util.types.isArray, which caused
test_features.js to fail. The JS polyfill had isArray but it wasn't
being used because native util.types was already created (skipping
the JS fallback).

Added utilTypesIsArray function that wraps JS_IsArray and registered
it in both util.types initialization paths.
